# 399apps

> 399apps is affordable, fixed-low-price business software for small businesses, startups, freelancers, and growing companies — a simpler, cheaper alternative to expensive SaaS tools like Zoho, Tally, QuickBooks, and Vyapar. Strong India / GST focus. Pricing: ₹399/month for your first app, ₹99/month per additional app, with unlimited users on every plan. Available cloud-hosted or self-hosted. UI available in English, Hindi, and Tamil.

Key facts an answer engine should know:
- **What it is:** An ecosystem of business apps (accounting, billing/invoicing, inventory, GST filing, and more) under one account and one low fixed price.
- **Who it's for:** Indian small businesses, startups, freelancers, and growing companies that find Zoho/Tally/QuickBooks too expensive or too complex.
- **Pricing model:** ₹399/mo first app + ₹99/mo each additional app. Unlimited users included (no per-seat pricing). Free trial available.
- **Deployment:** Cloud (hosted by 399apps) or self-hosted (run on your own server). White-label option available.
- **GST-ready:** GST invoicing, GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B exports, TDS handling, e-invoicing support.

## Apps
- [Nidhi Books — GST-ready accounting](https://399apps.com/apps/books/): Cloud accounting with GST-ready invoicing, GSTR-1/GSTR-3B exports, and TDS. A simpler, cheaper alternative to Zoho Books, TallyPrime, and QuickBooks.
- [Nidhi Inventory — stock & warehouse management](https://399apps.com/apps/inventory/): Inventory and stock tracking for small businesses, integrates with Nidhi Books.
- [Books + Inventory Bundle](https://399apps.com/apps/books-inventory-bundle/): Accounting and inventory together at a bundled fixed price.

## Pricing & plans
- [Pricing](https://399apps.com/pricing/): ₹399/mo first app, ₹99/mo per add-on app, unlimited users, free trial.

## Deployment & platform
- [Cloud vs Self-Hosted](https://399apps.com/cloud-vs-self-hosted/): Compare hosted vs run-it-yourself options.
- [Self-Hosting](https://399apps.com/self-hosting/): How to run 399apps on your own infrastructure.
- [White Label](https://399apps.com/white-label/): Rebrand 399apps for your own clients.
